detail.description:
Chicken Farm Cozy Farm is a relaxing idle farming game where you build a happy farm collect animals and grow your business. Take care of cute chickens upgrade your barn hire workers and expand your cozy countryside world.

Manage your farm earn rewards and unlock new areas as your small ranch becomes a busy animal paradise. Enjoy simple gameplay colorful graphics and satisfying progress anytime.

Features

Build and upgrade your chicken farm

Collect cute animals and grow your ranch

Hire worker
detail.releaseNotes:
* Add new levels to discover
*Optimizing game performance
